user.title: OKTE EDC mailbox
user.description:
Enter the IMAP credentials for the mailbox receiving OKTE settlement emails.

⚠️ **Early-version, unofficial integration — use at your own risk.** It logs in with write access (it can flag, move, or delete messages depending on the cleanup mode you choose), stores your IMAP credentials in Home Assistant, and writes long-term statistics into the HA recorder. The values it produces are not suitable for billing or regulatory purposes without independent reconciliation. Recommended before continuing: use a dedicated mailbox you can afford to lose, back up your HA configuration and recorder database, and review the [README and source code](https://github.com/vaind/ha-okte-edc).
